description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet with a mid-century modern design, featuring three vertical doors. The front face is divided into three panels, with the left and center doors in a light gray color and the right door in a muted green, all framed by a natural wood border. The cabinet stands on four short, angled wooden legs, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. The sides and top are finished in a natural wood grain, adding warmth and texture to the overall look. Small, round knobs are present on the green doors, suggesting easy access to the interior storage compartments. The cabinet is likely constructed from wood or engineered wood, with painted or laminated door surfaces for visual contrast.
description: A tall, three-door cabinet with a natural wood frame, gray and green front panels, and angled wooden legs. The design is modern and functional, with visible knobs for opening the doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two light gray doors and one green door, all framed by wood, with the cabinet's legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full height and depth of the cabinet, with a continuous natural wood grain finish and no visible doors.
description_view_2: Front view with all three doors in muted green, framed by wood, and small round knobs visible on the doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the wood grain side panel and cabinet depth.
